Parse input JSON. Extract `user_id`, `timestamp`, `event_type` fields. Validate `event_type` against enum: click, view, purchase, refund. Reject records with null `user_id` or `timestamp` older than 2024-01-01. Batch validated records into groups of 500. POST each batch to https://ingest.analytics.internal/v2/events with header `X-Pipeline-Id: fiedler-etl-7`. Retry failed batches 3x with exponential backoff (base 2s). Log failures to `/var/log/etl/rejected.jsonl` with reason codes. Target throughput: 10,000 records/sec sustained.
